positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Tall, ethereal trees with glowing bioluminescent leaves and roots intertwining like glowing circuitry. Floating geometric orbs and nebulae in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant magenta hues. The overall composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, featuring clean silhouettes of the flora against a starlit, dark background. Style is Neo-Art Deco meets Pacific Northwest folklore. Print-ready vector aesthetic with thick lines and saturated jewel tones. Central composition for maximum visual impact.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, lowres, text, watermark, logos, copyright, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, amateur, bokeh
